childhood.familyBackground: Born into a Punjabi business family. Father was involved in manufacturing. The Lal family had connections to India's post-independence industrial development.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 펀자브 사업 가문에서 태어남. 아버지는 제조업에 종사. 랄 가문은 인도 독립 후 산업 발전과 연관.
childhood.education: Studied engineering at Delhi College of Engineering.
childhood.earlyLife: Developed interest in machinery and manufacturing from family environment.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 가족 환경에서 기계와 제조에 대한 관심 발전.

careerTimeline.event: Joined Eicher as a tractor manufacturing company
Acquired Royal Enfield, the iconic British motorcycle brand
careerTimeline.eventKo: 영국의 상징적 오토바이 브랜드 로열 엔필드 인수

careerTimeline.event: Restructured Eicher Motors, focusing on Royal Enfield motorcycles and commercial vehicles
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아이허 모터스 구조조정, 로열 엔필드 오토바이와 상용차에 집중

careerTimeline.event: Formed joint venture with Volvo for commercial trucks (VE Commercial Vehicles)
careerTimeline.eventKo: 상용 트럭을 위한 볼보와 합작투자(VE 상용차) 설립

careerTimeline.event: Royal Enfield became the fastest-growing motorcycle brand globally
careerTimeline.eventKo: 로열 엔필드가 글로벌 최고 성장 오토바이 브랜드로 부상

careerTimeline.event: Royal Enfield sold over 900,000 motorcycles annually

failures.description: Royal Enfield was nearly bankrupt when acquired; quality issues plagued the brand
failures.descriptionKo: 인수 당시 로열 엔필드는 거의 파산 상태; 품질 문제가 브랜드를 괴롭힘
failures.lesson: A storied brand can be revived with quality improvements and strategic focus
failures.lessonKo: 유서 깊은 브랜드도 품질 개선과 전략적 집중으로 부활 가능

quotes.text: Royal Enfield is not just a motorcycle. It's a way of life.
quotes.textKo: 로열 엔필드는 단순한 오토바이가 아니다. 삶의 방식이다.

personalTraits.knownFor: Reviving the Royal Enfield motorcycle brand from near-bankruptcy to a global cult phenomenon
personalTraits.knownForKo: 거의 파산 상태의 로열 엔필드 오토바이 브랜드를 글로벌 컬트 현상으로 부활
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and rural development in India.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 인도의 교육 및 농촌 개발 지원.
